## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential VA role for Jesus to support Jason Gong's growth initiatives at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jesus has diverse experience in operations, customer lifecycle management, and outreach at HipTrain](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks help with relationship-building, community growth, and AI-driven marketing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Both parties share interest in AI applications, with Jason's extensive background since 2018](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Jesus demonstrates eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies and marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai Overview

  - [AI-driven agency building machines to help customers grow](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Focus on content marketing, creating 10x more content for clients](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Aims to drive awareness, revenue, and signups for customers](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Jason leads growth, working with big customers and senior marketing professionals](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)

### Jesus' Background

  - [3 years at HipTrain, a U.S.-based personal training app](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Progressed from Operations Associate to Operations Manager](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Oversees end-to-end customer lifecycle: sales, support, billing, trainer management](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Experience with outreach via various channels (text, email, call, LinkedIn)](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Uses tools like RB2B for prospecting, Zendesk for communication](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Created and maintains lead trackers using Google Sheets](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)

### Outreach and Community Growth Strategies

  - [Discussed potential for cold outreach and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Explored tools like SendGrid, Sales Navigator, Prospeo, Dbounce, and Clay for lead management](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Brainstormed messaging ideas for attracting marketers to GrowthX's AI-led growth community](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [Considered offering valuable content (e.g., AI workflows) as an incentive to join](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)

### AI Experience and Learning

  - [Jason's background in AI since 2018, working on code completion tools](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Jesus' recent involvement in AI automation for data analytics](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
  - [Discussion on Andrew Ng's machine learning course as a foundational resource](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)
  - [Jesus' experience using AI tools (Bolt, Superbase, ChatGPT) to build performance dashboards](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)

### Communication Preferences

  - [Jason prefers proactive communication and independent problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Slack for general updates, text for urgent matters, and occasional Zoom calls](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1824.0)
  - [Emphasis on giving autonomy and allowing for experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/FA12314cjaY6fK5AC8yxPx1knMjjCqEd?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
